# Hiero

> .NET Client Library for the Hiero Network and Hedera Hashgraph

Hiero is a .NET 10 SDK that provides idiomatic async access to the full Hedera
public network: cryptocurrency, consensus messaging, tokens, NFTs, smart
contracts, file storage, scheduled transactions, airdrops, and more.

- NuGet: https://www.nuget.org/packages/Hiero/
- Source: https://github.com/bugbytesinc/Hiero
- API Reference: https://hashgraph.bugbytes.com/
- License: GPL-3.0-or-later

## Quick Install

```sh
dotnet add package Hiero
```

Requires .NET 10 SDK.

## Clients

| Client | Purpose | Protocol |
|--------|---------|----------|
| `ConsensusClient` | Transactions and queries to gossip nodes | gRPC |
| `MirrorRestClient` | Historical data and state from Mirror Nodes | REST/JSON |
| `MirrorGrpcClient` | Real-time HCS topic subscriptions | gRPC streaming |

## Detailed Documentation

- [Full AI-readable reference](llms-full.txt): Complete API surface, all operations, types, and code examples
- [Tutorials](https://hashgraph.bugbytes.com/tutorials/): Getting started guides
- [API Docs](https://hashgraph.bugbytes.com/api/): Generated API reference
